title: docs: add Community Models (Alpha) section
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds a plain-language Community Models overview to the API docs (Models section)
- Payouts, "not our infrastructure" disclaimer, automated deactivation / manual-only reactivation
- Links owners to model-monitor.pollinations.ai/debug for live health

gist.headline: Bring your own bees
gist.blurb: We've added a new guide for Community Models to the API docs. Learn how to hook up your own infrastructure, earn Pollen, and monitor your model's health.
gist.summary: Added a Community Models (Alpha) section to the API documentation detailing payouts, infrastructure disclaimers, automated deactivation rules, and live health monitoring.
gist.impact: Model providers can now reference clear guidelines on how community-hosted models operate, including how to check their live status at model-monitor.pollinations.ai/debug.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot reading a glowing manual together in a digital garden, representing the new documentation for community-hosted models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and a cute chunky monitor robot reading a glowing open book together in a digital garden. Small code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around them. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'DOCS'.
